nodes.title: Next.js App Router
nodes.summary: Provides file‑system based routing for the SPA, simplifying navigation and page composition.

nodes.title: React with TypeScript
nodes.summary: Enables component‑based UI development with static type checking for reliability.

nodes.title: Supabase Cloud Persistence
nodes.summary: Stores notes and tags in PostgreSQL and pushes realtime updates to keep clients in sync.

nodes.title: LocalStorage Fallback
nodes.summary: Allows the app to function offline by persisting data locally when the network is unavailable.

nodes.title: CSS Custom Properties
nodes.summary: Drive theming across the app, enabling consistent colors and easy style adjustments.

nodes.title: Note Data Model
nodes.summary: Captures a stock ticker, rich text body, tags, and creation timestamp for each analysis entry.

nodes.title: Tag Data Model
nodes.summary: Defines a label with a name and a color reference, supporting categorization of notes.

nodes.title: Predefined Color Palette
nodes.summary: Offers ten reusable color schemes to ensure visual harmony for tags and UI elements.

nodes.title: Default Analysis Tags
nodes.summary: Provides common categories (Bullish, Bearish, etc.) to bootstrap user workflow.

nodes.title: Central AppContext
nodes.summary: Holds global state via React Context and a reducer, avoiding prop‑drilling.

nodes.title: Reducer Action Types
nodes.summary: Sixteen verbs (e.g., ADD_NOTE, SET_FILTER) describe every possible state transition.

nodes.title: Filtered Notes Logic
nodes.summary: Combines date, tag, search, and sort criteria to produce the visible note list.

nodes.title: Date‑Range Counter
nodes.summary: Calculates how many notes fall within a specific temporal window for UI badges.

nodes.title: Topbar Controls
nodes.summary: Offers quick access to search, new note creation, CSV import/export, and mobile navigation.

nodes.title: Sidebar Filters
nodes.summary: Lets users narrow notes by predefined or custom date ranges and by tag selection.

nodes.title: Notes Panel Pagination
nodes.summary: Displays notes in pages of twenty, loading more via infinite scroll for performance.

nodes.title: Rich Text Editor
nodes.summary: Supports ticker auto‑uppercase, bold, numbered lists, and tag toggles for detailed analysis.

nodes.title: Debounced Auto‑Save
nodes.summary: Saves changes after 600 ms of inactivity, reducing write load while protecting work.

nodes.title: Mobile Editor Footer
nodes.summary: Shows word count and provides copy, delete, and save actions optimized for touch.

nodes.title: Confirmation Modals
nodes.summary: Prompt users before destructive actions and allow tag renaming with a color picker.

nodes.title: Global Toast System
nodes.summary: Delivers transient feedback (success, error) to inform users of operation outcomes.

nodes.title: useNotes Hook
nodes.summary: Encapsulates context access and all CRUD, CSV, and tag functions for component reuse.

nodes.title: CSV Bulk Import/Export
nodes.summary: Enables mass note transfer while deduplicating to avoid duplicate entries.

nodes.title: Tag Management API
nodes.summary: Provides add, update, and delete operations to keep the tag taxonomy current.

nodes.title: Seed Data Initialization
nodes.summary: Populates five example notes on first launch to demonstrate functionality.

nodes.title: Client‑Side IDs
nodes.summary: Generate unique identifiers locally, decoupling from server‑assigned keys.

nodes.title: Realtime Subscription Channel
nodes.summary: Listens to postgres_changes, automatically updating UI when remote data mutates.

nodes.title: Utility Functions Suite
nodes.summary: Includes uid, relative/full date formatters, CSV parsers, and HTML escapers for common tasks.

nodes.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
nodes.summary: Ctrl+S/N/B/L accelerate note creation, saving, and formatting for power users.

nodes.title: Escape Closes Modals
nodes.summary: Provides a universal way to dismiss dialogs, improving keyboard navigation.

nodes.title: Three‑Panel Mobile Layout
nodes.summary: Stacks sidebar, notes list, and editor with slide transitions for intuitive navigation on small screens.

nodes.title: Data‑Panel Attribute
nodes.summary: Controls which panel is visible, driving the slide‑in UI behavior.

nodes.title: Bottom Navigation Bar
nodes.summary: Offers quick tabs to switch between filters, notes, and editor on mobile devices.

nodes.title: Touch‑Optimized Targets
nodes.summary: Ensures interactive elements are large enough for reliable finger taps.

nodes.title: Offline‑First Design
nodes.summary: Combines LocalStorage fallback with realtime sync to keep the app usable without network.

nodes.title: Consistent Theming via CSS Variables
nodes.summary: Allows dynamic color changes without rewriting component styles, maintaining visual coherence.

nodes.title: Predefined Date Ranges
nodes.summary: Users can filter notes by common intervals (today, week, month, etc.) for quick temporal analysis.

nodes.title: Toggleable Tag Filters
nodes.summary: Enables inclusion or exclusion of notes by tag, supporting focused review sessions.

nodes.title: Multiple Sort Modes
nodes.summary: Allows ordering notes by recency or ticker alphabetically, catering to different workflows.

nodes.title: Debounce Reduces Writes
nodes.summary: The 600 ms delay prevents excessive database calls during rapid typing.

nodes.title: CSV Deduplication Logic
nodes.summary: Ensures imported notes do not duplicate existing entries, preserving data integrity.

nodes.title: Example Seed Tickers
nodes.summary: Uses popular symbols (AAPL, TSLA, etc.) to illustrate note capabilities for new users.

nodes.title: Toast Feedback Importance
nodes.summary: Immediate notifications confirm actions, reducing user uncertainty.
